concepts.headline: Being exceptional equals volume.
concepts.subtext: The gap between average and exceptional is not 10% more effort. It is closer to 1,000%.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on a #faf9f6 warm off-white canvas. The headline sits at 56px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.03em, anchored to the left at 72px from the left edge, roughly 40% from the top. Below it, a 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) spans 120px wide, fading to transparent, at 16px gap below the headline. Subtext follows at 18px, #555, 24px gap below the bar, max-width 480px. The hero statistic '1,000%' sits large at 96px, DM Mono weight 400, color #111, positioned in the lower-left quadrant, with a tiny 11px uppercase DM Mono label 'the volume gap' in #888 directly below it. Right side of the canvas (roughly 55-100% width) is reserved for a particle dot network: scattered gray circles 3-6px at 0.08 opacity, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, suggesting scale and connection. The FLYWHEEL wordmark sits bottom-left at 13px uppercase DM Mono, #888, 72px from the left and 56px from the bottom.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, stat #111 DM Mono, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, brand mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The post distills to a single, powerful insight backed by one hero number: 1,000%. The stat_callout modality lets that number dominate the canvas with editorial authority, while the subtext delivers the philosophical core. This respects Flywheel's principle of communicating through removal: no list, no grid, just one truth made impossible to ignore.

concepts.headline: The volume gap is 1,000%.
concepts.subtext: A $1,500 coaching session, a spreadsheet of 500 posts, and the lesson that changed everything.
concepts.layout_description: Structured data layout on a #ffffff white canvas. Full-width heading at 52px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, left-anchored at 72px from left edge, 64px from top. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) runs 80px wide beneath it, fading to transparent. Subtext at 17px, #555, 20px below the bar, max-width 560px. Below, a 2-column CSS grid of 4 stat tiles, each with a 1px #e5e5e5 border, background #f0efe9, border-radius 0px, 24px internal padding. Each tile shows the VALUE in 38px DM Mono weight 400 #111 at top, LABEL in 12px uppercase DM Mono #888 below at 10px gap. Grid sits at 280px from the top, tile rows spaced 16px apart. Right portion of canvas beyond the grid (approximately 700-1128px x-range) left as intentional negative space with a faint particle dot cluster at 0.06 opacity. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-left, 13px uppercase DM Mono #888.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #111, subtext #555, stat values #111 DM Mono, stat labels #888 DM Mono, tile background #f0efe9, tile border #e5e5e5, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.06 opacity.
concepts.reasoning: The post contains four distinct, real proof points that together build the volume argument: the gap percentage, the number of tracked posts, the cost paid, and the revenue outcome. A multi-stat panel lets these speak in parallel without hierarchy fighting. The DM Mono treatment keeps it analytical and editorial rather than promotional.

concepts.headline: Average waits. Exceptional ships.
concepts.subtext: The gap between average and exceptional is not effort. It is volume. Always volume.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement layout on a #faf9f6 canvas with a faint FLYWHEEL watermark behind the headline at 140px bold uppercase, #000000 at 0.03 opacity, centered. Headline at 54px, weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111, centered horizontally, placed at approximately 44% from the top. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) 96px wide centered below the headline, fading to transparent at both ends, 14px gap. Subtext at 18px, #555, weight 400, centered, max-width 500px, 22px below the accent bar. Warm sand box-shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25) 0px 4px 20px on the headline text block container. FLYWHEEL wordmark bottom-center, 13px uppercase DM Mono #888, 56px from bottom. Particle dots very faint at 0.05 opacity scattered symmetrically in outer corners only, 4-6px circles with hairline connectors, not competing with the centered text.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, FLYWHEEL watermark #000000 at 0.03 opacity, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.05 opacity, brand mark #888.
concepts.reasoning: The post's most resonant distillation is the contrast between average and exceptional behavior. A bold statement card lets that tension live in a single punchy line, centered with the gravitas of a museum label. The FLYWHEEL watermark adds depth without clutter. This is the most stripped-back, editorially confident of the three concepts.

selection_reasoning: Concept 0 best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint by centering the single most powerful data point from the post: 1,000%. The stat_callout modality creates maximum visual tension through the contrast of a massive number against generous negative space, with the particle network adding texture without competing. It communicates authority through removal, letting one number carry the full weight of the post's argument. The left-anchored layout and particle-filled right side create the asymmetric balance that defines Flywheel's visual identity.
